name: EXPEDITORS INTERNATIONAL OF WASHINGTON INC
business: Expeditors International of Washington, Inc. provides a full suite of global logistics services, including airfreight, ocean freight, customs brokerage, warehousing, and other solutions. The company purchases cargo space from carriers and resells it to customers, and it does not own aircraft or ships. Its target market includes a diversified group of customers of varying sizes and industries, with no single customer accounting for 5% or more of revenues.

exposures.sentence: Expeditors International of Washington, Inc. (herein referred to as "Expeditors, the "Company," "we," "us," "our") provides a full suite of global logistics services, offering customers access to an international network of people and integrated information systems to support the movement and strategic positioning of goods.
